title: helianthemum marifolium
intro: Helianthemum marifolium, also known as Rockrose, is a flowering plant species in the family Cistaceae, commonly found in dry areas and rocky terrain. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can be attributed to the presence of flavonoids and other bioactive compounds. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and supporting immune function. Herbal preparations of Helianthemum marifolium can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions for topical and internal use, although its efficacy and safety are largely anecdotal and require further scientific research.
